nodes.name: Stilpnia
nodes.summary: Stilpnia（Stilpnia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联12种鸟类，如Black-headed tanager、Black-capped tanager、Straw-backed tanager等12种鸟类。

nodes.name: Masked tanager
nodes.summary: The masked tanager (Stilpnia nigrocincta) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, Guyana, Peru, and Venezuela. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and heavily degraded former forest. References Further reading
